You are getting this category because you selected ISO 28001:2007 in the Avetta PQF - ISO Certifications Questionnaire

ISO Certificates issued for a prior standard that are still valid and not expired will be accepted. If your organization also has a country specific certificate that is equivalent to the ISO Standard listed below, that certification will also be accepted as long as it is still valid.
ISO 28001 - Security Management Systems for the Supply Chain

Please upload your ISO 28001:2007 - Security Management Systems for the Supply Chain — Best Practices for Implementing Supply Chain Security, Assessments and Plans — Requirements and Guidance certificate:
Please enter the certificate expiration date:\n
